name: Electrodynamic Shield Seebeck Thermal and PVDF Acoustic Power Combiner Board

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: High-Current Schottky Barrier Rectifier Diodes
circuit_bill_of_materials.specification: MBR1545CT (45V / 15A), Low Forward Voltage Drop (<0.55V), TO-220 Package
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Isolates parallel Bismuth Telluride Seebeck thermal strings to prevent reverse power bleeding across the ignition core during localized threat impacts

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: High-Frequency Glass Passivated Bridge Rectifier
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Flips the massive high-frequency 24.5 kHz acoustic hum and explosive mechanical shockwave pressure pulses from the PVDF layers into raw DC

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Synchronous High-Voltage Step-Down Buck Converter Module
circuit_bill_of_materials.specification: LM5008A (Input up to 95V, Adjustable Output set to 24V DC, 350mA capacity)
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Steps down the high-voltage electrical current harvested from physical shockwaves into the common 24V charging bus threshold

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Heavy-Duty Bidirectional Transient Voltage Suppressor
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Passively blocks explosive voltage surges across the central rail if an intense kinetic impact or explosive blast triggers an extreme acoustic/pressure peak
